channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Southwest Airlines to end cabin service earlier on flights: Here's why
item.description: You'll be asked to fasten your seatbelts and return your seat to the upright position earlier than before.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Over 40 people hospitalized in Georgia during protests over suspension of EU talks
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — A third night of protests in the Georgian capital against the government’s decision to suspend negotiations to join the European Union left 44 people hospitalized, officials said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIKO MEGRELIDZE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lou Carnesecca, Hall of Fame coach who led St. John's for 24 seasons, dies
item.description: The excitable St. John’s coach whose outlandish sweaters became an emblem of his team’s rousing Final Four run in 1985, died at 99 on Saturday, just a few weeks shy of his 100th birthday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Don't miss these holiday shipping deadlines
item.description: The peak holiday shopping – and shipping – season is underway. If you want to make sure your gifts make it under the tree in time, you'll need to plan ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DACA recipients worry their protection from deportation won't last another Trump term
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Reyna Montoya was 10 when she and her family fled violence in Tijuana and illegally immigrated to the U.S. Growing up in Arizona, she worried even a minor traffic violation could lead to her deportation.
item.dc:creator: GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Syria launches counterattacks in an attempt to halt insurgents' surprise advance
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The Syrian military rushed in reinforcements and struck Idlib city Sunday in an attempt to push back insurgents from advancing farther after seizing Aleppo and surrounding strategic locations in an adjacent province in a surprise offensive.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Martha Stewart's anger at James Comey for making her 'trophy' criminal is 'understandable,' attorney says
item.description: Martha Stewart said then-U.S. Attorney James Comey and other prosecutors used her as a "trophy" during her criminal trial in 2004 in the new Netflix documentary, "Martha.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jealous teen's 'plan to kill' adoptive parents with birth mom's blessing exposed by detective with close ties
item.description: In 2013, Melissa and Roger Bluml were shot inside their vehicle. Police quickly had their eyes on their adopted son, Anthony “Tony" Bluml, and his biological mother, Kisha Schaberg.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump selects veteran law enforcement officer Chad Chronister for DEA administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced he would nominate Florida Sheriff Chad Chronister to serve as the administrator for the Drug Enforcement Agency. “I am pleased to nominate Sheriff Chad Chronister for Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA),” he wrote in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: After entering Aleppo, Syrian insurgents advance to a nearby province. Assad says he'll defeat them
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Thousands of Syrian insurgents took over most of Aleppo on Saturday, establishing positions in the country's largest city and controlling its airport before expanding their shock offensive to a nearby province.
item.dc:creator: SARAH EL DEEB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump says he'll nominate Kash Patel as FBI director to remake the agency. Here's what happens next
item.description: Donald Trump’s plan to nominate Kash Patel as FBI director sets the stage for a fresh round of turbulence at a law enforcement agency tasked with protecting the homeland and investigating federal crimes.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What to know about Kash Patel, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI
item.description: Kash Patel has called for radical changes at the FBI and was a fierce and vocal critic of the bureau’s work as it investigated ties between Russia and Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas catches fire in Death Valley National Park
item.description: A truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas caught fire in Death Valley National Park, according to the National Park Service.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, Fox 5

item.title: Don't fall for this secret Santa gift scam
item.description: A secret Santa-inspired scam is making its rounds again on social media, the Better Business Bureau warns. You may see it being called "Secret Sister" or "Secret Santa Dog" – but either way, it's illegal.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Bob Bryar, former My Chemical Romance drummer, dies at 44
item.description: (WGHP) — Bob Bryar, the drummer of the rock band My Chemical Romance from 2004 to 2014 has died, TMZ reports. He was 44. According to TMZ, Bryar was found dead in his Tennessee home Tuesday after last being seen alive on November 4.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Ratliff, ABC 4

item.title: Canada's Trudeau returns home after Trump meeting without assurances that tariffs are off the table
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau is returning home after his meeting with Donald Trump without assurances the president-elect will back away from threatened tariffs on all products from the major American trading partner.
item.dc:creator: Rob Gillies And Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Pennsylvania restaurant ordered to pay $184,000 for withholding tips
item.description: PITTSBURGH, Pa. (WHTM) - A Pennsylvania restaurant was ordered to pay $184,000 in back wages, damages, and penalties after an investigation found they withheld tips. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, WGN 9

item.title: Earl Holliman, 'The Rainmaker' and 'Twilight Zone' actor, dead at 96
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Award-winning actor Earl Holliman has died at the age of 96, according to multiple reports. Holliman died Monday in hospice care at his home in Studio City according to his spouse, Craig Curtis, who told The Hollywood Reporter.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: South Carolina mayor dies in crash while being ‘pursued’ by deputy, just days after his police force quit
item.description: McColl Mayor George Garner II died in a vehicle crash in Mechanicsville just days after his town's entire police force resigned, officials say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why your favorite catalogs are smaller this holiday season
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — Honey, they shrunk the catalogs. While retailers hope to go big this holiday season, customers may notice that the printed gift guides arriving in their mailboxes are smaller. Many of the millions of catalogs getting sent to U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SHARP, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Motherless man's search for answers ends at popular beach town with gruesome discovery
item.description: For decades, Michigan resident Richard Hanchett was searching for his biological mother. The FBI later told him that his mother was Cape Cod's "Lady of the Dunes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lake Effect Snow Warning extended; Sunday closures and travel alerts
item.description: (WJET/WFXP) — After a break in the snow Saturday, snow-covered roads and cars are still a major issue for thousands across the region after more than two feet fell, and some areas even saw more than three feet as crews continue to work around the clock to clear the roads, with interstate restriction
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: 2 San Jose men arrested after joyriding in stolen vehicle: police
item.description: (KRON) -- Two San Jose residents were arrested after possessing a stolen vehicle, according to the Benicia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, NewsNation

item.title: British lawmakers move closer to allowing terminally ill adults to end their lives
item.description: Members of Parliament approved the assisted dying bill by a 330-275 vote, signaling their approval in principle for the bill, which will undergo further scrutiny before it goes to a final vote.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Sniper kills Florida man who fired 200 rounds at neighboring condos
item.description: A Florida man was killed by a Volusia Sheriff's Office sniper after he reportedly fired more than 200 rounds at neighboring condos over several hours on Thanksgiving morning, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, NewsNation

item.title: DNA test brings NY father, daughter together after nearly 50 years
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Thanksgiving is more than a tradition – it's a time for loved ones and families to get together, to embrace and give thanks for all that is good in their lives. For one family in Rockland County, this is a special holiday. A daughter and her biological father are together.
item.dc:creator: Marvin Scott, KRON4

item.title: 5 tips to avoid overspending this holiday season
item.description: Nearly 30% of credit card users are still paying off last year's holiday debt. Here are five tips to avoid overspending.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, ABC 4

item.title: Black Friday smart TVs are cheaper than ever — Samsung, LG and more
item.description: BestReviews keeps track of all sorts of deals on your favorite products, including electronics and TVs. If you’re looking for the best early Black Friday TV deals, keep this article handy as we’ll continue to update it with the latest discounts.
item.dc:creator: Jmar Gambol, Fox 5

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Atlantic hurricane season comes to an end, leaving widespread damage in its wake
item.description: The 2024 Atlantic hurricane season comes to a close Saturday, bringing to an end a season that saw 11 hurricanes compared to the average seven, and death and destruction hundreds of miles from where storms came ashore on the U.S. Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Donald Trump's call for 'energy dominance' is likely to run into real-world limits
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to create a National Energy Council that he says will establish American “energy dominance” around the world as he seeks to boost U.S. oil and gas drilling and move away from President Joe Biden’s focus on climate change.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Amazon workers on strike from Black Friday to Cyber Monday
item.description: (WFXR) - Amazons workers across 20 countries, including the United States, are striking against what the organizing labor union calls anti-worker and anti-democratic practices.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Jaxtheimer, KRON4

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Diddy uses Donald Trump's criminal case in bail argument
item.description: Combs’ lawyers said his pretrial speech should be evaluated based on the standard used in Trump's criminal case.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, WGN 9
